LAW AND MOTION 301, THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S UNOPPOSED MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE A CROSS-COMPLAINT AGAINST CO-DEFENDANT D'ARCY & HARTY CONSTRUCTION, INC. IS GRANTED. THE CITY SHALL FILE WITHIN FIVE COURT DAYS OF ENTRY OF THIS ORDER. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED (301/CVA)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-12-2025 Vacated

MOTION FOR LEAVE TO File A Cross-Complaint Against D'Arcy & Harty Construction, Inc. And Roes 1-20; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Apr-17-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO File A Cross-Complaint Against D'Arcy & Harty Construction, Inc. And Roes 1-20

The City and County of San Francisco's unopposed motion for leave to file a cross-complaint against co-defendant D'Arcy & Harty Construction, Inc. is granted. The City shall file within five court days of entry of this order.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-02-2024 Set For Trial On Sep-15-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-19-2024 Continued To Oct-16-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
